---
title: "Empire Timeline"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="mongolia-shell province-shell">
  <section class="hero-panel province-hero"><div class="hero-copy"><p class="eyebrow">Quick Mongolia Quiz</p><h1>Empire Timeline</h1><p class="hero-text">Run through key dates and figures tied to Mongolia and the Mongol Empire.</p><div class="hero-chips"><span class="chip">10 history cards</span><span class="chip">No repeats</span><span class="chip">Streak mode</span></div></div><div class="hero-side"><div class="date-badge" id="miniStatusBadge">Loading history run...</div><a class="fact-link-card" href="index.html"><p class="mini-label">All games</p><h2>Back to the launcher.</h2></a></div></section>
  <section class="stats-strip"><article class="stat-card"><p class="stat-label">Current streak</p><p class="stat-value" id="miniStreakValue">0</p></article><article class="stat-card"><p class="stat-label">Best streak</p><p class="stat-value" id="miniBestValue">0</p></article><article class="stat-card"><p class="stat-label">Run progress</p><p class="stat-value" id="miniProgressValue">0 / 10</p></article><article class="stat-card"><p class="stat-label">Remaining</p><p class="stat-value" id="miniRemainingValue">10</p></article></section>
  <section class="play-grid"><article class="game-panel"><div class="question-meta"><span class="meta-pill">History challenge</span><span class="meta-pill subtle" id="miniIndexPill"></span></div><h2 id="miniPrompt"></h2><p class="question-lead" id="miniLead"></p><div class="options-grid" id="miniOptionsGrid"></div><div class="feedback-panel" id="miniFeedbackPanel" hidden><p class="feedback-result" id="miniFeedbackResult"></p><p class="feedback-fact" id="miniFeedbackText"></p><button class="primary-button" id="miniContinueButton" type="button">Next card</button></div><div class="panel-actions"><button class="ghost-button" id="miniRestartButton" type="button">Restart run</button></div></article><aside class="info-panel"><h3>How it works</h3><ul class="rules-list"><li>Chronology-themed multiple-choice cards.</li><li>Each card appears once per run.</li><li>Use restart for a new shuffle.</li></ul><div class="mini-panel"><p class="mini-label">Run summary</p><p id="miniRunSummary"></p></div></aside></section>
</div>
<script>
window.MINI_QUIZ_CONFIG = { id: "empire-timeline", title: "Empire Timeline", lead: "Choose the best answer about Mongolian history and chronology.", questions: [
{ question: "Who unified the Mongol tribes and founded the Mongol Empire?", answer: "Chinggis Khan", options: ["Chinggis Khan", "Kublai Khan", "Ogedei Khan", "Tamerlane"], detail: "Temujin became Chinggis Khan after unification." },
{ question: "In which year was Temujin proclaimed Chinggis Khan?", answer: "1206", options: ["1206", "1162", "1271", "1368"], detail: "1206 marks the formal founding moment of the empire." },
{ question: "What was the early imperial capital in Mongolia called?", answer: "Karakorum", options: ["Karakorum", "Kashgar", "Bukhara", "Samarkand"], detail: "Karakorum stood in the Orkhon Valley." },
{ question: "Which ruler established the Yuan dynasty in China?", answer: "Kublai Khan", options: ["Kublai Khan", "Batu Khan", "Munkh Khan", "Ariq Boke"], detail: "Kublai founded the Yuan in 1271." },
{ question: "The Mongol Empire is remembered at peak as what?", answer: "Largest contiguous land empire", options: ["Largest contiguous land empire", "Largest island empire", "Smallest desert empire", "Oldest republic"], detail: "Its territory formed the largest continuous land empire in history." },
{ question: "Which monastery near Karakorum is among Mongolia's oldest surviving?", answer: "Erdene Zuu", options: ["Erdene Zuu", "Potala", "Kumbum", "Jokhang"], detail: "Erdene Zuu was built near the old capital region." },
{ question: "Which title belonged to Mongolia's last theocratic monarch?", answer: "Bogd Khan", options: ["Bogd Khan", "Shah", "Sultan", "Tsar"], detail: "Bogd Khan led independent Mongolia in the early 20th century." },
{ question: "In which year did Mongolia's democratic revolution begin?", answer: "1990", options: ["1990", "1945", "1960", "2005"], detail: "1990 protests led to democratic reforms." },
{ question: "Which political system returned after the 1990 transition?", answer: "Multi-party elections", options: ["Multi-party elections", "Absolute monarchy", "Military junta", "One-party colonial rule"], detail: "Democratization enabled competitive elections." },
{ question: "Which valley has been central to many steppe empires?", answer: "Orkhon Valley", options: ["Orkhon Valley", "Nile Valley", "Amazon Basin", "Po Valley"], detail: "The Orkhon Valley is a core historical landscape in Mongolia." }
]};
</script>
<script src="mini-quiz.js"></script>
```
